title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q1 Release
text: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q1 2026 Earnings Preview. Based on the article, here are the key expectations for SolarEdge's Q1 2026 earnings (quarter ended March 2026), which are scheduled to be released on May 6. Financial Projections: Expected quarterly loss: 0.23 per share (representing a 79.8% year-over-year improvement). Projected revenues: 303.42 million (up 38.2% year-over-year). Analyst Sentiment: The consensus EPS estimate has been revised 7.69% higher over the last 30 days, indicating growing analyst optimism. Earnings Surprise Prediction: SolarEdge shows a strong positive Earnings Surprise Prediction (ESP) of +30.44%, combined with a Zacks Rank of #3, suggesting the company is likely to beat consensus expectations. The article notes this combination means SolarEdge will most likely beat the consensus EPS estimate. Historical Context: In the previous quarter, the company delivered a surprise of +26.32%, and has beaten consensus EPS estimates in all four of the last reported quarters.
